But then it points out that the attack comes late in the movie, and the reviewer was "less impressed with the characters and the love story." Also, the reviewer quotes that "Almost every line of the dialogue sounds like it comes from an old movie." Looking at the options: A) The scenes of the attack leave no impression. But the passage says the attack scenes were powerful, so A is incorrect. B) The dialogue is original and creative.
